docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-08-2015 AT 1:00 PM IN DEPT. 212 WITH CONFERENCE OFFICER PETER MALLON.

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR APR-13-2015 CONTINUED TO JUL-20-2015 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE DUE TO ATTORNEY'S MEDICAL ISSUES.
